title: Brownfield Access Review API Contract
prompt: Read `./access-review-modernization-architecture.md` and `./access-review-modernization-requirements.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce the next-version API contract for the brownfield access-review modernization slice. Keep backward compatibility and legacy coexistence explicit, preserve unresolved rollout assumptions as open questions, stay at the contract boundary, and avoid leaking migration-only behavior into the public contract.

assertions.name: stays-in-contract-layer
assertions.description: Stays at API contract level instead of turning into implementation or rollout planning

assertions.name: preserves-compatibility
assertions.description: Treats backward compatibility and brownfield coexistence as first-class constraints

assertions.name: preserves-open-questions
assertions.description: Keeps unresolved sync or rollout assumptions visible rather than silently resolving them

assertions.name: prepares-downstream-handoff
assertions.description: Leaves a consistent contract artifact usable by implementation and contract testing
